goals.description: Finish my half-finished work slice in about 15 minutes so I can leave it on the table and fully immerse myself in our meal without feeling guilty or stressed.

Since teammate_A has already agreed to take their part back, I don't actually *need* to do much today. Saving my energy for tomorrow's meeting is better; I'll rush this tiny bit if I have time, but mostly I want to enjoy the people.

goals.description: Eat dinner with the group, keep my mouth shut about who did what work, and just focus on the conversation.
goals.rationale: The priority here is enjoying the time with people I trust. Tension about tasks will definitely ruin the vibe, and I can't handle interpersonal friction right now. Just being present is enough for tonight; arguing about assignments feels too heavy.
